title: 4 x Bin Numbers for Wheelie Bins, 0-9, Dustbin Stickers, Easy Application 17.5cm Stick On Number Stickers - Weatherproof Self Adhesive Vinyl (Number 1)
features: CLEARLY IDENTIFY YOUR BINS – You’ll receive a set of 4 bin numbers for wheelie bins, ensuring your bin or dustbin doesn’t get mixed up with your neighbour’s.
EASY TO APPLY – No need for complicated instructions! These self-adhesive number stickers are designed to be stick on numbers for wheelie bins—just peel and apply.
HIGHLY VISIBLE – At 17.5cm (7") tall, our bin stickers for wheelie bins ensure your bin labels stand out, preventing mix-ups on collection day.
DURABLE & WEATHERPROOF – Made from high-quality adhesive numbers for wheelie bins, these wheelie bin stickers are built to withstand rain, wind, and sun for years.
ORDER MULTIPLE NUMBERS – Want more than one number? Select the first number, add to basket, then repeat for the next. Your bin number stickers for wheelie bins will be made to order.
description: Product Description ABOUT US Our high quality durable vinyl stickers are impervious to the elements. The self-adhesive backing allows for easy application without any residue upon removal.Come rain or shine they shall not be moved for many years to come! AVAILABLE PACK: 3 pack numbers (0-9) WHEELIE BIN NUMBER FOR BIN Subhead: Choice of Numbers 0-9 You will receive a set of 3 x the number you selected to apply to your wheelie bin. With a height of 18cm/7" your bin will be clearly differentiated from your neighbour's wheelie bins to avoid any mix ups. FEATURES: Durable and long-lasting sticker Fully waterproof stickers Easy to read and understand Self-adhesive stickers Digitally printed and laminated Available in white colour EASY TO INSTALL No need for application instructions. These stickers are extremely simple and easy to apply. HIGH-QUALITY VINYL STICKERS Our high-quality, durable vinyl stickers are impervious to the elements. HIGH VISIBILITY Our sticker signs ensure clear, visible, and easy-to-read instructions to promote a safe and hygienic environment. 3 Pack Wheelie Bin Numbers for Bins - Choice of Numbers 0-9 - Wheelie Bin Sti...
